title: Global search overlay state management store
purpose: Manages the open/closed state of a global search overlay that can be triggered from anywhere in the UI, not just via keyboard shortcut.
module_context: Exports a Zustand store that maintains global search state with methods to open, close, and toggle the overlay.

steps.content: Initialize the store with default open state set to false.
Define the open method to set the store's open state to true.
Define the close method to set the store's open state to false.
Define the toggle method to flip the store's open state to its opposite value.
